repos.name: capital-build-reconciler
repos.demo_cmd: python -m capital_reconcile ingest --provider anthropic --raw tests/fixtures --out reports/2026-M06.fixture.parquet

repos.name: dispatch-optimizer
repos.demo_cmd: pip install -r requirements.txt; python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload

repos.name: LLM-evaluation-framework
repos.demo_cmd: pip install -e ".[dev]"; llm-evals run eval_suites/customer_support/ --stage all --output html

repos.name: MIT-SDM-Thesis-on-System-Dynamics-Modeling-of-Bitcoin
repos.demo_cmd: open thesis_checkpoint.mdl in Vensim DSS 9.2.4 (load DataFiles/ConsolidatedData.vdfx)

repos.name: pre-mortem-ledger
repos.demo_cmd: python -m uv run premortem ledger list

repos.name: promotion-vs-pip
repos.demo_cmd: npm run validate && npm run render

repos.name: repo-position-coupling-index
repos.demo_cmd: python -m uv run coupling validate coupling_index/2026-M07.md

repos.name: Robust-Facility-Location
repos.demo_cmd: pip install -r requirements.txt; streamlit run app.py

repos.name: semiconductor-e2e-manufacturing-optimization
repos.demo_cmd: pip install -r requirements.txt; python -m streamlit run app.py

repos.name: supplier-risk-rag-agent
repos.demo_cmd: python -m uv run streamlit run app.py

repos.name: trace-to-eval-harness
repos.demo_cmd: python -m trace_to_eval run examples/eval_cases.yaml --traces examples/traces --out reports/run.json

repos.name: world-food-program-robust-simulator
repos.demo_cmd: pip install -r requirements.txt; streamlit run app.py
